cards.front: What does Depth First Search (DFS) stand for?
What is the main characteristic of Depth First Search?
cards.back: Exploring as far as possible along each branch before backtracking

cards.front: What is the time complexity of a Depth First Search algorithm?
cards.back: O(V + E) in the worst case, where V is the number of vertices and E is the number of edges

cards.front: What is the space complexity of a Depth First Search algorithm?
cards.back: O(V) in the worst case, where V is the number of vertices

cards.front: What is used to keep track of visited nodes in a Depth First Search?
